title: Extended Datacube Dimension
description: Extends the STAC Datacube Extension dimension object with size, values_href, and generator properties for scalable dimension member dissemination.

type.description: Dimension type as defined by the STAC Datacube Extension.

extent.description: The extent (minimum and maximum values) of the dimension.

values.description: Explicit enumeration of dimension members. OPTIONAL when values_href is provided.

step.description: The space between dimension values. Use null for irregular spacing. Supports ISO 8601 durations and extended notation (1K for dekad, 1P for pentad).

unit.description: Unit of measure. Reference UCUM or OGC Definition URIs.

reference_system.description: The spatial or temporal reference system.

size.description: Total number of discrete members in this dimension. Allows clients to know cardinality without downloading values. RECOMMENDED.

values_href.description: Link to a paginated endpoint returning dimension values. When present, values MAY be omitted. Relative or absolute URI.

generator.description: Algorithmic member generation definition. See generator.json schema.

values_href.description: When values_href is provided, values becomes optional.
